assertions.title: Vector store endpoints automatically opt into the retrieval beta contract
assertions.issues: `crud_and_errors` proves `openai-beta: assistants=v2` on create/retrieve/update/delete routes, but the observed list/search test only proves route and payload shape; it does not directly assert beta-header injection for list or search, so the full assertion is not directly proven by cargo output plus inspected test coverage.

assertions.title: Vector store listing and search preserve their distinct page contracts

evidence.observation: The passing test verifies list uses cursor query params (`after`, `before`, `limit`, `order`) while search hits `POST /v1/vector_stores/vs_123/search` and preserves `query`, `filters`, `max_num_results`, `ranking_options`, and `rewrite_query` in the request body.

assertions.title: Vector store file endpoints preserve attach, metadata, listing, delete, and parsed-content flows

evidence.observation: The passing test covers attach/create, retrieve, update attributes, paginated list, parsed-content retrieval, and vector-store file delete semantics across the expected `/v1/vector_stores/.../files` routes.

assertions.title: Vector store file polling helpers respect caller or server poll intervals and preserve failure visibility
assertions.issues: The passing polling-helper test directly proves poll-helper headers and explicit/server-driven interval handling, but it only exercises `in_progress -> completed` flows and does not directly prove that failed or cancelled terminal states remain visible to the caller.

assertions.title: Vector store file upload helpers compose Files API upload with attach-and-poll flows

evidence.observation: The passing tests verify `upload` first posts to `/v1/files` with multipart `purpose=assistants`, then attaches via `/v1/vector_stores/vs_123/files`, and `upload_and_poll` reuses that flow before polling the attached vector-store file to completion.

assertions.title: Top-Level Vector Store CRUD Preserves Resource Semantics Beyond Header Injection

evidence.observation: The passing CRUD test verifies typed create/retrieve/update/delete behavior, resource fields such as name and status, vector-store delete response decoding, and not-found error mapping on retrieve.

frictions.description: `vector_store_files_contract` briefly waited on the Cargo package-cache file lock before compiling.
frictions.resolution: The lock cleared without intervention and the command completed successfully.

blockers.description: No direct proof for list/search beta-header injection within the observed vector-store contract tests.
No direct proof that polling helpers surface failed or cancelled terminal states; the observed test coverage stops at completed states.

summary: Ran all three assigned cargo test commands successfully. VAL-FILES-007, VAL-FILES-008, VAL-FILES-010, and VAL-FILES-021 are directly supported by passing test output plus inspected test coverage; VAL-FILES-006 and VAL-FILES-009 remain blocked because the observed tests do not directly prove the full contract language.
